title: Shatter
description: A simple vein-mining enchantment that supports Auto-smelting and Fortune.
body:
Shatter adds a custom enchantment that enables vein mining for blocks. When a block is broken the mod recursively detects and destroys connected blocks of the same type up to a limit of 16 (configurable). It ensures full compatibility with Auto-smelting features and Fortune drops. Tool durability is consumed for each individual block broken to maintain game balance. The effect applies to both mineral veins and trees. Players can **bypass** the mechanic by sneaking while mining.
